verification_gate: Red tests prove dependencies finish before dependents, same-level peers respect the parallel cap, tag filters preserve topology, cycles and unresolved required dependencies fail closed, and cancellation prevents later levels from starting.

gate_result.red_first: contracts committed red at meta_cli de3d55a (1/6, only the pre-existing fixture path passing), implementation green at d761c05 (6/6)
gate_result.levels_evidence: DependencyGraph::execution_levels groups the diamond fixture into [base] < [left,right] < [top]; every dependency lands in a strictly earlier level than its dependents
gate_result.cap_evidence: dag_exec::execute_levels passes the loop config's max_parallel to every level batch; the unit test asserts the cap reaches each batch, and meta exec --dag runs each level as one bounded loop_lib run
gate_result.tag_evidence: execution_levels_filtered(core) keeps base < left < top with right dropped; live meta exec --dag --tag core shows level 0 base then level 1 mid (leaf/extra dropped) with ordering intact
gate_result.cycle_evidence: execution_levels detects a Kahn stall and bails naming the stuck projects; unit test cycles_fail_closed confirms
gate_result.unresolved_evidence: validate_required_resolved rejects any depends_on that resolves to neither a project nor a provider, naming the requirer, before anything runs
gate_result.cancellation_evidence: execute_levels stops on the first failing level and reports failed_level with the cancelled count; unit test proves level 2 never starts after level 1 fails, and live meta exec --dag shows 'dependency level 1 failed; 1 later level(s) were cancelled' with base(level0) succeeding first
gate_result.loop_lib_untouched: loop_lib's existing all-or-nothing failure semantics compose per level; no change to the execution engine
gate_result.allowed_path_note: the task's allowed_paths name /home/flexnetos/meta/src/meta/** which does not exist (stale FlexNetOS-era layout); the real targets are meta_cli (dependency_graph.rs, dag_exec.rs, main.rs) and loop_lib — loop_lib needed no change
gate_result.full_suite: dag_exec 6/6, meta_cli 133 passed / 0 failed, clippy clean
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: live meta exec --dag runs against a three-repo chain fixture (base→mid→leaf): ordered level execution, core-tag topology preservation, and mid-level failure cancelling the leaf level, all observed from the real binary

proof_summary: ARCHBP-028 is complete: meta exec is wired to dependency-DAG execution order (meta_cli PR FlexNetOS/meta_cli#9, red de3d55a → green d761c05). The dependency graph groups projects into execution levels where every dependency precedes its dependents, cycles fail closed via Kahn stall detection, tag filters preserve full-graph topology, and unresolved required dependencies fail closed before anything runs; execute_levels drives the levels in order, passes the parallel cap to every batch, and cancels every later level on first failure. meta exec --dag consumes this over the untouched loop_lib engine — proven by dag_exec 6/6, meta_cli 133/0, clippy clean, and live runs against a base→mid→leaf fixture showing ordered execution, core-tag topology preservation, and a mid-level failure cancelling the leaf level.
